query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a textured surface displaying flowing, wavy linear patterns arranged horizontally across the frame. A warm, amber-golden light creates a radial gradient that brightly illuminates the center and gradually darkens to deep brown and black toward the edges and corners. The lit area reveals organic curved contours and fine parallel striations across the material.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of a textured surface displaying flowing, wavy linear patterns, entirely overlaid with heavy analog film grain, noise, and scanline artifacts evoking degraded VHS or archival footage. A strong radial spotlight illuminates the center with bright amber light while the surrounding areas fall into deep darkness, all filtered through a tactile, mechanically worn lo-fi texture.
